records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Gaming Board of Tanzania or a recognised racing operator publishes a stable domestic meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed official law establishes regulatory context relating to horse racing but does not establish active domestic fixtures or a current racecourse calendar.
limitations: Legal authority is not evidence of an active meeting calendar.
No current racecourse or date row is approved.
Gaming and betting regulation must not be presented as a racing fixture source.
records.notes: Use explanatory legal-context treatment only until a current official domestic calendar is reviewed.
